refnamediv.refpurpose: Removes noise from an image using a wavelet transform

refentry.refsect1:
&reftitle.parameters;
threshold
The threshold, expressed as a percentage of the quantum range, below which wavelet coefficients are treated as noise and attenuated.
softness
Controls how gradually coefficients near the threshold are attenuated. A value of 0 applies a hard threshold, while larger values produce a softer, more gradual transition.
